title: Bombay High Court dismisses PIL against Z+ security cover for RSS, calls it ‘motivated’
description: The Nagpur Bench of the Bombay High Court on Monday dismissed a public interest litigation (PIL) petition against grant of of Z+ VVIP security cover to Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS) and its leaders including chief Mohan Bhagwat [Lalan Kishor Singh v. Union Of India].A division bench of Chief Justice Shree Chandrashekhar and Justice Anil S Kilor said that it was “motivated petition” and an abuse of the process of law.The PIL filed by one Lalan Kishor Singh relied on Supreme Court’s decision t
